summary: Tested Arequipa Mission Trip Resource Hub end-to-end. Backend (10/10 pytest passing) covers root, contact create/list with email validation, prayer-request create/list/pray increment, _id leakage prevention, and 404 on unknown id. Frontend (9/9) verified hero text, all nav anchors, packing & FAQ accordions, prayer wall submit + pray increment (0->1), contact form HTML5 empty validation + valid submit success state. No console errors. All interactive elements use data-testid.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: contact endpoint stores email as EmailStr but no rate limiting / spam protection on the public POST /api/contact and /api/prayer-requests endpoints — consider adding throttling for production.
server.py: list_contacts is publicly readable (GET /api/contact returns ALL submitted contacts without auth). Likely a privacy concern for a public site — should be admin-only or removed.
All endpoints are clean: explicit {_id: 0} projection, async/await consistently used, EmailStr validation, datetime ISO serialization, proper 404 on pray for unknown id.
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_-prefixed contacts and prayer requests via API and UI during testing (not cleaned up; harmless for a fresh public site).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All MVP flows verified working. Backend tests live at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py and use REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. If new endpoints are added (e.g., admin auth on GET /api/contact), update tests accordingly. Note GET /api/contact is currently publicly accessible — flag if behavior should change.
